summary: Iteration 3 testing COMPLETE. New pricing constants ($15/$6/$29/$80), material note on quote, /api/pricing/share + /shared/{slug} + /shared/{slug}/pdf endpoints, and SharedQuote public page all verified. Backend: 13/13 unit + 9/9 new integration = 22/22 PASS. Frontend: SharedQuote page, ExportDialog material note, commercial license label ($29), Share flow all PASS. Regressions (live-price-pill, watermark, Pro full_pack) all still working. One minor observation: backend returns share_url with K8s-internal cluster host (see notes).

integration_issues.issue: Backend returns share_url pointing to the internal cluster domain (e.g., https://desk-ai-designer.cluster-0.preview.emergentcf.cloud/quote/<slug>) instead of the public frontend host (desk-ai-designer.preview.emergentagent.com). The link still resolves/works, but copying it to share externally exposes the cluster URL. Root cause: `request.headers.get('origin')` in /app/backend/server.py ~L1671 receives the cluster-internal Origin because the ingress rewrites it before reaching FastAPI. Link still functional, so non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional/low priority) Normalise share_url host in POST /api/pricing/share so the returned link always uses the public frontend host. The frontend ExportDialog already falls back to window.location.origin when share_url is missing — but since backend does return an absolute URL it is used verbatim. Consider prefering REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL-equivalent env var on the backend or a known allow-list of frontend hosts.
critical_code_review_comments: pricing.py constants cleanly updated (BASE_FEE=15, SHEET_FEE=6, COMMERCIAL_LICENSE_FEE=29, MATERIAL_COST_PER_SHEET_NZD=80). QuoteBreakdown now has material_cost_estimate + material_note. All unit tests updated and passing.

test_pricing.py has duplicate definitions of test_bundle_upgrade_increases_price and test_more_sheets_increases_price (L82-94 repeats L70-81 content). Second definition wins in pytest so both are effectively single tests — recommend removing the dup block to avoid confusion.

New pricing_router endpoints (/pricing/share, /pricing/shared/{slug}, /pricing/shared/{slug}/pdf) are unauthenticated as per spec. Slug uses uuid4.hex[:10] — adequate entropy for low-volume traffic; would recommend 16+ hex for production scale.
_render_quote_html correctly includes 'UltimateDesk', 'Export total', and 'Plywood (separate)' — all three verified via GET /api/pricing/shared/<slug>/pdf integration test.
Views counter on shared quote increments on each GET (verified).
ExportDialog.jsx constructs pdf_url using window.location.origin (L177) — safe, works from any host. Commercial license label now reads from catalog (`+$${commercialFee} NZD`), correctly renders $29.
SharedQuote.jsx error state renders 'Quote not found or link expired' with `data-testid=shared-quote-error` — proper UX for invalid slug.
server.py still 1700+ lines — consider splitting pricing_router and exports_router into modules (non-blocking, carried over from iteration 2).
shared_quotes docs have no TTL index — PRD says `expires: null`, so that is intentional, but consider adding a cleanup job if growth becomes an issue.
seed_data_creation: Registered 1 fresh non-Pro user for ExportDialog share testing. Created ~3 shared_quotes docs (slugs prefixed design_name with 'E2E' and 'TEST_'). 1 export doc created for admin full_pack regression check.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features verified end-to-end. Share link backend+frontend wiring works. When calling the share API from within a browser page, Origin header becomes the cluster-internal host — ExportDialog consumes data.share_url verbatim, so the displayed/copied link carries the cluster hostname rather than the preview hostname. The link still works (cluster routes to same app), so this is a cosmetic/UX concern not a functional bug. Pricing page Pricing.jsx shows the new range copy verbatim from spec (Small $22-28, Medium $35-45, Gaming/studio $50-75).

features_tested.POST /api/pricing/quote small office: PASS - total=$22 in 20-28 range, material_cost_estimate>0, material_note contains 'Material' and '$80'
features_tested.POST /api/pricing/share: PASS - slug is 10 hex chars, share_url ends /quote/{slug}, pdf_url=/api/pricing/shared/{slug}/pdf
features_tested.GET /api/pricing/shared/{slug}: PASS - returns saved quote, views counter increments on each GET
features_tested.Frontend /quote/:slug SharedQuote page v: PASS - shows design_name, headline, total ($46), material-note, shared-quote-pdf-btn, shared-quote-cta-btn
features_tested.Frontend /quote/:slug invalid slug: PASS - shows 'Quote not found or link expired' with data-testid=shared-quote-error
features_tested.ExportDialog share-quote-btn flow: PASS - POSTs /api/pricing/share, renders share-link-input + copy-share-link-btn + open-share-link-btn + download-quote-pdf-btn
features_tested.Regression: canvas watermark for non-Pro: PASS - diagonal email-based watermark painted across DeskPreview3D canvas
features_tested.Regression: Pro admin full_pack generate: PASS - returns files dict with dxf+svg+gcode+pdf
